_provenance.purpose: committed-oracle fixtures: tokenizer identity + transformers-fp32 embedding parity
_provenance.canonical_oracle: sentence-transformers granite pipeline in float32 (ModernBert -> CLS pool -> L2); lossless fp32 upcast of the bf16 checkpoint
_provenance.cross_check: cosine(canonical vs the fixed-512 static-mask GraniteGraph driver, the CoreML trace source); see driver_crosscheck.json
_provenance.output: PRE-L2-norm 384-d CLS in the CoreML graph; goldens are UNIT-NORMALIZED (L2 in Rust)
_provenance.prompt_note: granite r2 retrieval is PROMPT-FREE: config_sentence_transformers.json prompts are empty; the corpus is RAW strings, no task prefixes
_provenance.tokenizer: granite tokenizer.json (o200k-style BPE, vocab 180000); token_ids truncated at 512

entries.text: how do I build a Rust CoreML inference library for text embeddings?
Rust crates that wrap CoreML provide native on-device text-embedding inference.
